backlog.packageTitle: Midnight Lockbox Beat 1 - Unit 331 Full Production Package

tasks.title: Production Package Orchestration - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Run cross-bot orchestration for Beat 1 delivery: confirm scope, dependencies, sequencing, and signoff gates for story, messaging, media, web, audio, QA, and release.
deliverables: Unified execution board and dependency map
signoffCriteria: All downstream issues labeled, sequenced, and tracked
No unresolved blocker at release gate

tasks.title: Product Acceptance Spec - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1 Experience
tasks.description: Define commercial acceptance criteria for Beat 1 immersive experience across channels, clues, timing, and emotional pacing.
signoffCriteria: Spec fully aligned to story package contracts
Clear measurable acceptance checks for QA

tasks.title: Story Engine Buildout - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1 Branching and Consequences
tasks.description: Implement full branching logic, clue propagation, villain stage handling, and consequence matrix for Beat 1.
signoffCriteria: All choice paths resolve deterministically
No dead-end branch without explicit failure handling

tasks.title: Backend Messaging and Timing Orchestration - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Implement message scheduling, channel simulation payloads, villain direct-contact reaction rules, and persistence updates for Beat 1.
deliverables: Message templates and channel payload mappings
signoffCriteria: Message cadence matches spec timing windows
Ignored/replied villain branches handled correctly

tasks.title: Web Gameplay Presentation - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1 Immersive UI
tasks.description: Deliver polished player-facing web runtime for Beat 1 including popup messages, evidence feed, response actions, and ending transition surfaces.
signoffCriteria: Desktop/mobile behavior passes functional QA
Experience reads as premium, not debug controls

tasks.title: UX and Visual Direction - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1 Presentation Polish
tasks.description: Define and apply visual treatment for Beat 1 layouts, hierarchy, typography, and interaction cues in the horror-luxe style.
signoffCriteria: Visual cohesion across feed, board, and popup layers
No contrast/legibility regressions

tasks.title: Media Pipeline Output - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1 Evidence and Promo Set
tasks.description: Generate and validate image/video/document prompt packs and production assets for Beat 1 including embedded visible and hidden clues.
signoffCriteria: All critical assets generated with provenance metadata
Clue embedding consistent across media

tasks.title: Voice and Audio Production - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Produce narrator scripts, character voice lines, villain taunts, score prompts, and ambient SFX package with provider-chain readiness.
deliverables: Character/villain voice scripts and synthesis plan
Music + SFX prompts and usage map
signoffCriteria: Distinct voice identity for each speaking role
Audio cues align with tension pacing

tasks.title: In-World Website Ecosystem - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Build and manage in-world web content set (Gallowglass pages, local bulletin, hidden maintenance portal) and operational content governance.
deliverables: Web page copy and navigation structures
signoffCriteria: Site ecosystem feels internally consistent
Hidden clues discoverable and non-breaking

tasks.title: Growth and Re-Engagement Hooks - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Implement lifecycle hooks around Beat 1 drop (resume nudges, teaser emails, referral moments) without breaking immersion.
signoffCriteria: Messages remain in-universe
Lifecycle triggers mapped to player states

tasks.title: Security and Safety Review - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Validate threat tone boundaries, consent preferences, content safety controls, spoofing protections, and legal compliance for Beat 1 messaging/media.
signoffCriteria: Configurable intensity safeguards validated
No unsafe escalation path without opt controls

tasks.title: Commercial QA Certification - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Create and execute full validation suite for Beat 1: functional, visual, accessibility, media clue, and regression checks.
signoffCriteria: All critical tests green
No blocker defects in player-critical path

tasks.title: Release Pipeline and Deploy Readiness - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Ensure CI/CD gates, asset build steps, environment configs, and deployment runbook updates include Beat 1 package requirements.
deliverables: Pipeline updates for new generation scripts
signoffCriteria: CI path includes package generation/validation
Runbook supports deterministic rollout and rollback

tasks.title: Commercial Packaging and Retention Strategy - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Define monetization-safe packaging for Beat 1 (teaser/free depth, premium unlock points, retention loops) aligned to product tone.
signoffCriteria: Commercial hooks do not break immersion
KPIs tied to measurable in-product events

tasks.title: Mobile Experience Parity Plan - Midnight Lockbox Beat 1
tasks.description: Define and stage mobile parity implementation for Beat 1 messaging, evidence board interactions, and clue-flow handling.
signoffCriteria: Parity plan ready for implementation sprint
No unresolved mobile UX blockers
